name: batch
context: Process thousands of Claude requests asynchronously at 50% discount via the Message Batches API
info: The Message Batches API (`POST /v1/messages/batches`) processes large volumes of Messages API requests asynchronously with a 50% cost reduction. Submit up to 100,000 requests per batch, each with a `custom_id` and standard Messages API `params`. Batches process within 24 hours. Poll status via `GET /v1/messages/batches/{id}`, then retrieve results as JSONL via `GET /v1/messages/batches/{id}/results`. Results may arrive out of order — use `custom_id` to match. Result types: `succeeded` (with full message), `errored` (with error details). Cancel unprocessed requests via `POST /v1/messages/batches/{id}/cancel`. Batch + prompt caching discounts stack. Results available for 29 days after completion.
triggers: process requests in bulk with claude
get 50 percent discount on claude api

sections.title: Creating a batch
sections.body: Call `POST /v1/messages/batches` with a `requests` array. Each request has a `custom_id` (unique within the batch, used to match results) and `params` (standard Messages API parameters: model, max_tokens, messages, system, tools, temperature, etc.). The batch starts processing immediately. Maximum 100,000 requests per batch.

sections.title: Polling and retrieving results
sections.body: Poll `GET /v1/messages/batches/{id}` for status. The `processing_status` field shows progress: `processing` or `ended`. The `request_counts` object shows `processing`, `succeeded`, and `errored` counts. Once ended, retrieve results via `GET /v1/messages/batches/{id}/results` which returns JSONL. Each line has `custom_id` and `result` (type: succeeded/errored). Results may be out of order.

sections.title: Pricing and limits
sections.body: Batch processing costs 50% of standard API pricing for both input and output tokens. Prompt caching discounts stack on top. Processing completes within 24 hours. Up to 100,000 requests per batch. Tier-based limits on concurrent requests in queue (100k–500k). Results available for 29 days after completion.
